message:
feat(demo): implement toast notification system (bd-35e)

Add complete toast system with:
- Toast and ToastManager types with severity levels (Info/Warn/Error)
- Auto-dismiss with configurable TTL and fade-out animation
- Stack display in bottom-right corner above status bar
- Level-specific colors and icons
- App::show_toast, toast_info, toast_warn, toast_error helpers
- Integration with App::tick for lifetime management
- draw_pass_toasts for rendering with alpha blending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
